disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No lip/tongue/throat swelling, no voice change, no difficulty swallowing or breathing
trigger_question_examples: Any swelling of your lips, tongue or throat, or change in your voice?
Any tightness in the throat or trouble breathing or swallowing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — no swelling of my lips or tongue, my voice is normal and I can breathe and swallow fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No lightheadedness, no abdominal pain or vomiting, no faintness on standing
trigger_question_examples: Any dizziness, faintness, or tummy pain and vomiting with this?
Can you tell me a bit more about that?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No dizziness or tummy pain, I don't feel faint.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Preceding viral upper respiratory illness ~4 days ago; no new drug/food/sting exposure
trigger_question_examples: Have you been unwell recently, or started any new medicine, food or had an insect sting?
Can you tell me a bit more about that?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a mild cold a few days ago. No new medicines, foods or stings.
